summary:
MINDSET AND MINISTRY FOCUS: Brandon emphasizes the importance of managing the heavy spiritual burdens he receives through visions by releasing them to God rather than carrying them personally. He encourages maintaining a vertical focus on God instead of camping around past successes or failures, as human praise and criticism are fleeting. Brandon stresses the necessity of rejecting a poverty mentality and replacing it with an inward image of divine blessing, health, and success. Reflecting on his personal journey toward his forty-fifth birthday and full-time ministry, he highlights the power of spoken words and imagination in shaping reality, urging listeners to align their thoughts and declarations with scripture to manifest positive outcomes and focus on bringing in the spiritual harvest.

CATACLYSMIC WORLD EVENTS: Brandon recounts a profound vision of immense destruction, describing a massive asteroid striking the Atlantic Ocean near San Juan, Puerto Rico. This impact triggers a colossal tsunami that devastates Miami, Cape Hatteras, and reaches as far as Africa and England. He details seeing advanced green defense lasers, specifically originating from the New Orleans area, intercepting and splitting the asteroid when traditional military missiles failed. Additionally, Brandon describes a concurrent vision involving Asian men on a Mississippi River barge launching a black-and-white missile marked USSR. The missile detonates prematurely over several Eastern and Southern states, triggering an EMP attack that disables internet and cellular networks on the East Coast while leaving the West Coast unaffected. He also mentions seeing widespread earthquakes and recurring tsunamis in Japan.

ECONOMIC SHIFTS AND SOCIETAL TRANSFORMATION: Brandon discusses rapid global changes, highlighting Donald Trump utilizing Truth Social to raise billions for purchasing Bitcoin, signaling a massive financial shift. He warns of an impending event that will permanently alter life in a twenty-four-hour period, prompting individuals to grow backyard gardens due to severe food shortages. Brandon underscores that this period serves as a divine humbling for societal pride and a final call for the awake church remnant to prepare themselves mentally and spiritually for the incoming harvest.

PATRIOTIC REVIVAL AND REBIRTHING OF AMERICA: Brandon describes an intense patriotic vision set in Washington, D.C., featuring the White House, the Washington Monument, and abundant cornfields ready for harvest. He foresees a new spiritual Independence Day and a rebirthing of the nation peaking in June and July. This new era is symbolized by a baby wrapped in a royal blue ribbon reading United States of America and nestled in an American flag, accompanied by a bald eagle. He simultaneously sees a vision of Israel represented by the Star of David and another baby, signifying a pivotal global paradigm shift and a unique window of opportunity for believers to intercede for a golden age.

HISTORICAL RESTITUTION AND HEALING: Brandon shares an emotional journey through American history, witnessing the suffering of African Americans during the era of slavery and the Civil War. He sees visions of the Underground Railroad, Harriet Tubman, Abraham Lincoln, and Confederate soldiers, noting that the agonizing prayers of enslaved people singing around fires in wooden camps still echo in heaven. God reveals a plan for profound spiritual healing and financial restitution with interest for the descendants of these slaves, declaring that historical wrongs will not be swept under the rug. Furthermore, Brandon experiences a vision of the Trail of Tears, observing Native Americans enduring the freezing snow while being driven by soldiers. He conveys that God remembers their immense pain and is also orchestrating a complete restoration and restitution for the Native American community.
rawData: [May 31, 2025]-[The Lord showed me in prayer restitution is coming to the Christian African Americans with interest]-[https://youtu.be/JY1ZzrgdX_A]-[Hey, good morning family. I give it and then I lay it up there and I go, 'It's not affecting me. I'm not living that. I'm just a vessel that He uses, an instrument that He prays through to get the job done.' But I refuse to live in that vision. I'm always in the right place. I'm going to say this—I always say this—I'm always in the right place at the right time. I'm always doing what He tells me to do at all times. And I'm going to hear Him at all times, and I'm going to see everything He needs me to see at all times. I won't miss it. I'm going to listen to my Father. And even if I do, I pick myself up and I say, 'Hey, you know what? I got a skinned knee, but I'm going to keep going.' You don't camp around failure. You don't camp around success. I stay vertical. Because if you look at your failures or you look at your successes, failures get you to have no confidence at all and you don't want to keep going, and successes give you a big head and you go, 'Well, it's all about me.' No, no, no, no. It's all about Him. And if you stay vertical and you're always looking at Him, regardless if it's a success or a failure, it's all about Him. I don't let my eyes get all—it's like, 'Oh, the star-struckness of things.' Who cares? Keep moving. A success is a success, but guess what? It's yesterday's news after a while. Does that make sense? A failure is a failure. People will camp around your failures a lot because they are insecure about their own lives and their own abilities and what God's doing with them. So they want to bring you down and make you camp around your failures. They like it. So I always say, you know what? Most people don't want to see you successful. Most people don't want to see you have a big ministry. Most people don't want to see you have a big following or money or anything. They just want you to stay a little lower than them. A little lower than them. And so I just want to say that it's the truth. But I'm going to tell you, we don't camp there. So what do we do? We keep our eyes on Jesus, for we know what is coming. We know what's coming, and what's coming: a shaking to awaken. A shaking to awaken. I'm not worried about the shaking to awaken in that moment. I'm going to tell you yesterday when you all prayed with me, that was heavy. It was heavy. Why? Because I saw a lot of destruction. I saw a lot of death. I saw the earthquakes. It was like 200 stories high—like a huge wave, two huge waves that came in and washed way inland, caused great destruction. And many people were sucked out to sea. I told you I saw a laser. The United States has lasers now. I don't know if this is top-secret information, so whatever. I do my best, but I saw lasers. That's what we should be focusing on right now. There are many people that if they die today, they will not make it. And those are the ones that he's after. And that's why I'm trying to tell you to get that inward image of the blessing on the inside of you. Imagine yourself having it. Imagine yourself living it and program your mind. You've got to change and train your thoughts by renewing your mind on this beautiful Bible more.' He corrected me. He said, 'You need to be in that book more. You have to visualize it inside because that's what I see, and I grab ahold of it by faith. I can do what this Bible tells me I can do. By his stripes, I am healed. What does that look like? Does it look like Megan is right now? No. So, I refuse to keep seeing her that way. Changing it and seeing yourself being successful and saying, 'God, I know what your word says about me.
